description: Ecuadorian criminal and terrorist organization specializing in drug trafficking and contract killing. Formed in 2020 as a splinter group from Los Choneros after the death of Jorge Luis Zambrano. Operates primarily in Latacunga, Riobamba, Cuenca, Machala, and Pastaza province, with over 8,000 members. Involved in prison riots and political violence, including the assassination of presidential candidate Fernando Villavicencio.
